calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Dismissal - No Appearance
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Debra Lew, Attorney for CCSF Treasurer/ Tax Collector ; Respondent
No appearnce by Christopher Ray Jackson

This matter was continued from October 7, 2015, there being no appearance by Appellant at that time. Debra Lew, counsel for respondent was ordered to renotice the appellant as to the date and time of the contiued hearing. A 'Notice of Date, Time and Place of Hearing on Appeal' was filed by respondent on October 7, 2015. Debra Lew testifies that a copy of the Notice was mailed to the two known addresses of the appellant.

There being no appearance by the appellant, the Court signs an Orders Dismissing Small Claims Appeal, as abandoned by the appellant. Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Set For Trial On Oct-07-15 At 10:15 A.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Continued To Oct-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-07-2015 Continued To Nov-18-15 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 502
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Debra Lew, Assistant Tax Collector Attorney for Respondent City and County of San Francisco
No appearance by Appellant Christopher Ray Jackson.
In the interest of Justice, The Court, on its' own motionm, will continue this hearing to Wednesday Novemebr 18, 2015 at 1:30pm in Department 502. Counsel for respondent is to mail notice of hearing to both of the known addresses od the Appellant. If appellant fails to appear, the Court will dismiss the appeal as Abandoned. Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported
